channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Attacks from all sides: Why Iraq was dragged into US-Israel war on Iran
item.description: Iraq has seen attacks from both sides of the conflict: Iran and its proxies on the one side and the US on the other.

item.title: Turkish president urges end to Iran war
item.description: Turkiye’s president has urged a return to the negotiating table before the Iran war “sets the entire region on fire.”

item.title: Could Iran be using China’s highly accurate BeiDou navigation system?
item.description: Intelligence experts have suggested China has made its satellite navigation system available to Iran.

item.title: Spain removes ambassador from Israel in protest to Iran war, Gaza genocide
item.description: Madrid recalls ambassador amid rising diplomatic tensions and criticism of US-Israeli actions in Iran.

item.title: Which countries have seen the highest petrol prices since the Iran war?
item.description: At least 85 countries have reported petrol price rises since the attacks on Iran by the US and Israel on February 28.

item.title: Iran security chief warns against anti-government protests
item.description: Anti-government protesters will be treated as an “enemy” as US-Israeli attacks continue, says Iran’s security chief.

item.title: How much a day of war on Iran costs the US
item.description: The US spent $3.7 billion in the first four days of bombing Iran. Here’s the bill.

item.title: 12 days: How 2025 Iran blueprint trapped US, Israel in longer war
item.description: Unlike the truce from last year's 12-day war, "decapitation" strikes have locked US and Israel in a war of attrition.

item.title: 4 day week, fewer car trips in Philippines as Iran fallout bites
item.description: Rising fuel prices are pushing more people to use public transport and prompting a four-day work week in Manila.

item.title: UN aid worker killed in DR Congo’s rebel-held Goma
item.description: France's president said a French aid worker with UNICEF was killed, after M23 rebels said 'combat drone' hit the city.
